detailed_specifications.requirement: The tool must traverse all subdirectories and identify every class and function in the source code.
detailed_specifications.expected_behavior: Return a list of file paths and function names while excluding libraries like node_modules or venv.

detailed_specifications.requirement: Generate test cases for Statement and Condition coverage.
detailed_specifications.expected_behavior: Produce code that executes every line and evaluates every logical branch at least once.

detailed_specifications.requirement: Generate tests using Boundary Value Analysis (BVA) and Equivalence Class Partitioning (ECP).
detailed_specifications.expected_behavior: Input sets that test the extreme limits and representative groups of data defined in these specs.
